items.title: 3 reasons XRP and Solana could lead the next risk-on phase
items.whyYouShouldCare: XRP and Solana's potential leadership in a risk-on phase could enhance their market positioning and attract more liquidity to their ecosystems.

items.title: Ripple wants AI agents to pay in XRP and RLUSD. The market is still mostly USDC
items.whyYouShouldCare: Ripple's push for AI agents to transact in XRP and RLUSD highlights the ongoing dominance of USDC, affecting liquidity dynamics in the crypto market.

items.title: SpaceX’s IPO exposes the first crack in tokenized stocks – fragmented ownership and allocation
items.whyYouShouldCare: SpaceX's IPO reveals challenges in tokenized stocks, which may impact investor confidence and the broader adoption of tokenized assets within ecosystems like Solana.
